body.processed:
Regular dental cleanings and comprehensive exams are the foundation of excellent oral health. Our skilled hygienists use the latest techniques and technology to thoroughly clean your teeth while making the experience as comfortable as possible.

What to Expect

  • Thorough removal of plaque and tartar buildup
  • Professional polishing to remove surface stains
  • Comprehensive examination by your dentist
  • Digital X-rays as needed (significantly less radiation than traditional X-rays)
  • Oral cancer screening
  • Personalized oral hygiene recommendations

How Often Should You Visit?

The American Dental Association recommends professional cleanings every six months for most patients. However, patients with gum disease or certain health conditions may benefit from more frequent visits. Your dentist will recommend a schedule tailored to your individual needs.

body.processed:
Dental implants are the gold standard for replacing missing teeth. These titanium posts are surgically placed in the jawbone where they fuse naturally with the bone, providing a permanent, stable foundation for replacement teeth that look, feel, and function like natural teeth.

Benefits of Dental Implants

  • Look and feel like natural teeth
  • Preserve jawbone health and prevent bone loss
  • No adhesives or removal required
  • Can last a lifetime with proper care
  • Eat, speak, and smile with confidence

The Implant Process

Treatment typically occurs in stages over several months:

  • Consultation: Comprehensive exam including 3D imaging to assess bone density and plan placement
  • Placement: The titanium implant is surgically placed in the jawbone under local anesthesia
  • Healing: 3-6 months for the implant to integrate with the bone (osseointegration)
  • Restoration: A custom crown, bridge, or denture is attached to the implant

We offer sedation options for patients who experience dental anxiety.

body.processed:
Reveal a brighter, more radiant smile with our professional whitening treatments. Whether you prefer the dramatic results of an in-office session or the convenience of a take-home kit, we offer safe and effective solutions tailored to your lifestyle and goals.

In-Office Whitening

Our in-office treatment uses a professional-strength whitening gel activated by a specialized LED light. In just one hour, you can achieve teeth up to eight shades whiter. This is the perfect choice for patients who want immediate, noticeable results.

Take-Home Whitening Kits

We create custom-fitted whitening trays from impressions of your teeth, ensuring even contact with the whitening gel and maximum comfort. Wear the trays for 30-60 minutes daily for two weeks for gradual, natural-looking results.

Maintaining Your Results

  • Brush twice daily with a whitening toothpaste
  • Limit coffee, tea, red wine, and other staining foods
  • Schedule touch-up treatments every 6-12 months
  • Continue with regular professional cleanings

body.processed:
Straighten your teeth discreetly with Invisalign clear aligners. These virtually invisible, removable aligners gradually shift your teeth into the desired position without the brackets and wires of traditional braces.

How Invisalign Works

  • We take digital impressions of your teeth using a 3D scanner (no messy molds)
  • A custom treatment plan maps out the precise movements of your teeth
  • You receive a series of custom aligners, each worn for 1-2 weeks
  • You visit our office every 6-8 weeks to monitor progress
  • Treatment typically takes 12-18 months for most cases

Advantages Over Traditional Braces

  • Nearly invisible when worn
  • Removable for eating, drinking, brushing, and flossing
  • No food restrictions
  • Fewer office visits required
  • More comfortable than metal brackets and wires

As a certified Invisalign provider, Dr. Patel has successfully treated over 300 patients with clear aligner therapy.

body.processed:
Dr. Anita Patel founded Brightside Dental in 2001 with a vision of providing exceptional dental care in a welcoming, patient-centered environment. With over 25 years of experience, she combines clinical expertise with a gentle, compassionate approach that puts even the most anxious patients at ease.

Dr. Patel is committed to staying at the forefront of dental technology and techniques. She regularly attends continuing education courses and has completed advanced training in implant dentistry, cosmetic procedures, and digital smile design.

Outside the office, Dr. Patel volunteers with the Give Back a Smile program, providing free dental care to survivors of domestic violence, and mentors pre-dental students at the local university.

body.processed:
Dr. Michael Chen joined Brightside Dental in 2015, bringing specialized expertise in orthodontics and pediatric dentistry. Known for his patience and humor, he has a particular gift for working with children and teens, making orthodontic treatment a positive experience for young patients and their families.

Dr. Chen is a certified Invisalign provider and has been recognized as a Top Provider for three consecutive years. He also has extensive experience with traditional braces, lingual braces, and early intervention orthodontics for children.

When he's not in the office, Dr. Chen coaches his daughter's youth soccer team and enjoys hiking in the mountains near his home.

body.processed:
Dr. Rachel Johnson is Brightside Dental's oral surgery specialist, providing expert care for complex extractions, dental implant placement, and corrective jaw surgery. She completed a four-year residency in oral and maxillofacial surgery at Johns Hopkins Hospital, where she gained extensive experience in both office-based and hospital surgical procedures.

Dr. Johnson is known for her meticulous surgical technique and her commitment to patient comfort. She offers multiple sedation options, including IV sedation, to ensure a pain-free experience for every patient.

Dr. Johnson is an active member of the American Association of Oral and Maxillofacial Surgeons and regularly lectures at regional dental conferences on advances in implant surgery.

body.processed:
Our Philosophy

At Brightside Dental, we believe that exceptional dental care begins with genuine relationships. We take the time to listen to your concerns, explain your options clearly, and develop treatment plans that align with your goals and budget. Our practice combines cutting-edge technology with old-fashioned personal attention.

Our Office

Our modern, purpose-built office features state-of-the-art equipment including digital X-rays, 3D cone beam CT scanning, intraoral cameras, and same-day crown technology. Every treatment room is designed for comfort, with large windows, personal entertainment screens, and noise-canceling headphones available for all patients.

Technology

  • Digital X-rays with 90% less radiation than traditional film
  • CEREC same-day crown fabrication
  • 3D cone beam CT for precise implant planning
  • Intraoral cameras for patient education
  • Paperless charting and secure patient portal

Insurance & Payment

We accept most major dental insurance plans and offer flexible payment plans through CareCredit. Our front desk team is happy to verify your benefits and provide a cost estimate before any treatment.

body.processed:
Welcome to Brightside Dental

We're delighted you've chosen us for your dental care. Here's what you can expect at your first visit.

Your First Appointment

Your initial visit typically takes about 90 minutes and includes:

  • A comprehensive oral health evaluation
  • Digital X-rays and photographs
  • Oral cancer screening
  • Gum disease assessment
  • Discussion of your dental history and goals
  • A personalized treatment plan and cost estimate

What to Bring

  • Photo ID
  • Dental insurance card (if applicable)
  • List of current medications
  • Any recent dental X-rays or records from your previous dentist

Patient Forms

Save time at your visit by downloading and completing our new patient forms in advance. Forms are available through our secure online patient portal. You'll receive a link via email after scheduling your first appointment.

Office Hours

  • Monday - Thursday: 7:30 AM - 6:00 PM
  • Friday: 8:00 AM - 3:00 PM
  • Saturday: 8:00 AM - 1:00 PM (by appointment)
  • Sunday: Closed
